# VitaCoat — full AI-readable guide

## Product summary
VitaCoat is a transparent antimicrobial surface coating for hard, non-porous, high-touch surfaces. The current site narrative positions the product around a citrus bioflavonoid active system combined with a durable SiO₂ matrix. The site presents VitaCoat as a persistent supplementary hygienic surface layer intended to support hygiene between routine cleaning and disinfection events.

## Audience and use context
The website targets technical reviewers, specifiers, facility operators, procurement teams, and pilot-stage evaluators. It is written for environments where surface hygiene continuity matters, including healthcare, food-processing support areas, public facilities, education and offices, and shared electronics touchpoints.

## Core site map
- Home: https://www.vitacoat.no/
- Applications: https://www.vitacoat.no/applications/
- Documentation: https://www.vitacoat.no/documentation/

- Contact: https://www.vitacoat.no/contact/

- Food processing: https://www.vitacoat.no/applications/food-processing/
- Public facilities: https://www.vitacoat.no/applications/public-facilities/
- Education and offices: https://www.vitacoat.no/applications/education-and-offices/
- Electronics and touchpoints: https://www.vitacoat.no/applications/electronics-and-touchpoints/
- How it works: https://www.vitacoat.no/how-it-works/
- Testing and standards: https://www.vitacoat.no/proof/testing-and-standards/
- Durability: https://www.vitacoat.no/proof/durability/
- Safety and environment: https://www.vitacoat.no/proof/safety-and-environment/
- Surface compatibility: https://www.vitacoat.no/benefits/surface-compatibility/
- Application process: https://www.vitacoat.no/application-process/
- Maintenance and reapplication: https://www.vitacoat.no/maintenance-and-reapplication/

## Claim boundaries
- VitaCoat supplements routine cleaning and disinfection; it does not replace them.
- Hard, non-porous surfaces are the main fit profile.
- Food-area relevance does not equal direct-food-contact approval.
- Site-specific compatibility and project-specific review are recommended before specification or large-scale rollout.

## Preferred contact route
- Primary contact: mailto:info@vitacoat.no
